title: schizachyrium spicatum
intro: Schizachyrium spicatum, also known as Little Bluestem, is a species of grass native to North America, characterized by its blue-green foliage and feathery plumes. The medicinal properties of Little Bluestem include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Schizachyrium spicatum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Little Bluestem can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
